Creates a process tool provider catalog.

## Import

```ts
import { processToolProviderCatalog } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function processToolProviderCatalog(opts: ProcessToolProviderAdapterPackOptions = {}): ToolProviderCatalog
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `ProcessToolProviderAdapterPackOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The process tool provider catalog result.

## Example

```ts
import { processToolProviderCatalog } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```
